model.sql:
WITH g3a_union_left_source AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(business_key AS STRING) AS business_key,
    CAST(event_date AS DATE) AS event_date,
    CAST(metric_value AS DECIMAL(18, 4)) AS metric_value
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<left_table_name>') }}
),
g3a_union_right_source AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(business_key AS STRING) AS business_key,
    CAST(event_date AS DATE) AS event_date,
    CAST(metric_value AS DECIMAL(18, 4)) AS metric_value
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<right_table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  business_key,
  event_date,
  metric_value
FROM g3a_union_left_source
UNION DISTINCT
SELECT
  business_key,
  event_date,
  metric_value
FROM g3a_union_right_source

WITH g3b_intersect_left_source AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(business_key AS STRING) AS business_key,
    CAST(event_date AS DATE) AS event_date
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<left_table_name>') }}
),
g3b_intersect_right_source AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(business_key AS STRING) AS business_key,
    CAST(event_date AS DATE) AS event_date
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<right_table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  business_key,
  event_date
FROM g3b_intersect_left_source
INTERSECT DISTINCT
SELECT
  business_key,
  event_date
FROM g3b_intersect_right_source

WITH g3c_except_left_source AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(business_key AS STRING) AS business_key,
    CAST(event_date AS DATE) AS event_date,
    CAST(metric_value AS DECIMAL(18, 4)) AS metric_value
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<left_table_name>') }}
),
g3c_except_right_source AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(business_key AS STRING) AS business_key,
    CAST(event_date AS DATE) AS event_date,
    CAST(metric_value AS DECIMAL(18, 4)) AS metric_value
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<right_table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  business_key,
  event_date,
  metric_value
FROM g3c_except_left_source
EXCEPT DISTINCT
SELECT
  business_key,
  event_date,
  metric_value
FROM g3c_except_right_source

WITH g3d_distinct_source AS (
  SELECT
    business_key,
    event_date,
    status_code
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT DISTINCT
  business_key,
  event_date,
  status_code
FROM g3d_distinct_source

WITH g3e_dedup_source AS (
  SELECT
    business_key,
    event_ts,
    ingest_ts,
    record_id,
    metric_value
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
),
g3e_dedup_ranked AS (
  SELECT
    business_key,
    event_ts,
    ingest_ts,
    record_id,
    metric_value,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY business_key
      ORDER BY event_ts DESC, ingest_ts DESC, record_id DESC
    ) AS dedup_rank
  FROM g3e_dedup_source
)
SELECT
  business_key,
  event_ts,
  ingest_ts,
  record_id,
  metric_value
FROM g3e_dedup_ranked
WHERE dedup_rank = 1

WITH g3f_top1_source AS (
  SELECT
    business_key,
    event_ts,
    ingest_ts,
    metric_value,
    source_priority
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  business_key,
  event_ts,
  ingest_ts,
  metric_value,
  source_priority
FROM g3f_top1_source
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
  PARTITION BY business_key
  ORDER BY event_ts DESC, ingest_ts DESC, source_priority ASC
) = 1

WITH g3g_base_source AS (
  SELECT
    record_id,
    status_code,
    metric_value
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
),
g3g_inline_mapping AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM VALUES
    ('A', 'ACTIVE'),
    ('I', 'INACTIVE'),
    ('P', 'PENDING')
    AS status_map(status_code, status_label)
)
SELECT
  base_source.record_id,
  base_source.status_code,
  status_map.status_label,
  base_source.metric_value
FROM g3g_base_source AS base_source
LEFT JOIN g3g_inline_mapping AS status_map
  ON base_source.status_code = status_map.status_code
